title: First Step
description: New to modding or Modrinth? Start here with simply the optimizations, no need to tinker with messy configs.
body:
# It's Pure Minecraft

There's really not much to say about this modpack. It's just pure optimizations to improve vanilla's performance, pre-configured to near perfection. There's no gimmicks, no configs that need to be tinkered with, no mod menu, no invasive mods, and no noticeable quality of life features. ***(Testing done on a Base Model 2017 MacBook Pro 13”; Entire spec sheet [here](https://support.apple.com/kb/SP754))***

If you like the vanilla experience of Minecraft, but just want extra frames, chances are, you'll like this modpack.

## Mods Used

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - **CaffeineMC**
    - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - **FlashyReese**
    - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - **FlashyReese**
    - [Unofficial Sodium Biome Blending Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/unofficial-sodium-biome-blending-fix) - **Juuz**
    - [Better Sodium Video Settings Button](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-sodium-video-settings-button) - **Pieman**
    - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - **comp500**
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium/version/mc1.19-0.8.0) - **CaffeineMC**
- [TieFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiefix) - **j-tai**
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - **ishland**
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - **YaLTeR**
- [Starlight (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - **spottedleaf**
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - **juliand665**
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - **malte0811**
- !!This mod is why the modpack is now clientside & server!! [Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis) - **VidTu**
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - **fxmorin**
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - **tr7zw**
- [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) - **tr7zw**
- [MainMenuChanger](https://modrinth.com/mod/mainmenuchanger) - **Stereo528**
- [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) - **comp500**
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - **isxander**
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - **isxander**
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - **MehVahdJukaar**
- [Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium) - **Aeltumn**
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - **modmuss50 & sfPlayer1**

## Honorable Mentions

The config files for mods here are bundled in the modpack, so all you need to do is manually install the mods you might want from this list. Hope you like it!

- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - **Prospector & Contributors**
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - **peppercode1**
- [Chunks fade in](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in) - **kerudion** (Unfortunately the only way to disable the icon in the options menu is by installing Mod Menu)

### Mods Great by Default

- [BedrockWaters](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrockwaters) - **2Retr0**
- [Ambient Environment](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ambient-environment) - **Jaredlll08 (Only on CF; biome blend enabled required)**
- [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) - **CreativeMD**
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) - **Sollace**
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - **PinkGoosik**
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - **Aizistral**
